operations.name: Turf War
operations.description: When selecting this campaign operation, select one of the campaign attack types, select this gang's district or one connected to it, then select one opposing faction. In the resolve battle operations stage, each faction will select players from their faction to defend against the battle operations that have been declared against them. For each of those battle operations, a player from that faction can be selected to play against the player whose gang declared it.

operations.name: Relocate
operations.description: Move your gang to one district on the map.

operations.name: Home Turf Advantage
operations.description: For this phase, each time this gang's faction is attacked on this district or one connected to it, the player from this faction fighting the battle can choose the theatre instead of the player from the attacking faction.

operations.name: Send Enforcers
operations.description: Select this gang's district or one connected to it. For each opposing faction, the war master rolls one D6; on a 5+, that faction's power level is reduced by 1.
